title: Painter Table
description: Add table to make map arts survival friendly
body:
With this mod you can draw any image from the Internet on maps. Just copy link of an image and use it to make an art.

# Mod Content

## Dense Paper

New paper type added by this mod. It's using as base material for this mod.

## Pencil

Instrument to draw a sketch. Hold pencil in one hand and dense paper in another and press RMB to create a sketch.

## Sketch

Item that stores image URL and can be used in painter table to draw an image.

## Sketchbook

Item to store and preview all your sketches. Combine sketchbook and sketch to put it in. You can name sketch book and sketches inside. All sketches inside shown in grayscale (because it sketches).

## Painter Table

Main block of this mod. Put sketch ot sketch book with selected sketch inside to configure your art size. You can adjust height and width. One square is one map. Painter table can interact with hoppers to put dyes and dense paper and take map from output slot. Also you can select squares on preview to specify which maps you want to paint.

![Mapart Table Preview](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_483c6e32-591d-4a6d-9f94-be94fd2ab220.png)

## Usage

_Note: sketch and sketchbook are replaceable in painter table._

1.  Craft sketch using dense paper and pencil. 
2.  Put sketch in painter table
3.  Adjust art size
4.  Start painting

 

## WIP

Mod in development stage if you want to help please use my GitHub repository. I will grad if some one draw better textures or give some cool ideas.
